---
title: "Open Positions"
format: html
---

::: {.lead}
Join the Soft Tissue Biomechanics Group at LMS! We are always looking for motivated and talented individuals to contribute to our research in continuum mechanics, mechanobiology, and tissue engineering.
:::

---

## Current Vacancies

::: {.border .rounded .p-4 .bg-light .text-center .mb-5 .mt-4}
<h5 class="text-muted mb-0">There are currently no specific funded positions open.</h5>
<p class="text-muted mt-2 mb-0">However, we are always eager to discuss potential projects, fellowships, or future opportunities with outstanding candidates. Please see below for spontaneous applications.</p>
:::

## Spontaneous Applications

We highly encourage spontaneous applications from enthusiastic Master's students, PhD candidates, and Postdoctoral researchers who share our passion for biomechanics. 

If you are interested in joining our team, please follow these steps:

::: {.grid .mt-4 .mb-4}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.border .rounded .p-4 .text-center .h-100 .shadow-sm}
<div style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 15px;">📝</div>
#### 1. Fill the Form
Head over to our Contact page and fill out the inquiry form to briefly introduce yourself and your research interests.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.border .rounded .p-4 .text-center .h-100 .shadow-sm}
<div style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 15px;">📄</div>
#### 2. Prepare your CV
Make sure your academic Curriculum Vitae is up to date, highlighting your relevant skills, background, and publications.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.border .rounded .p-4 .text-center .h-100 .shadow-sm}
<div style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 15px;">✉️</div>
#### 3. Email the PIs
Send an email directly to our Principal Investigators with your CV attached and a short message explaining why you'd like to join us.
:::
:::

:::

::: {.text-center .mt-5}
[Go to Contact Page](contact.html){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg .px-5}
:::
